grades.expectation: Response mentions CQS training requirements for all conveyancing staff
grades.reason: Clearly states 'CQS Mandatory Onboarding Elements' and mentions firm-level training requirements for fee earners

grades.expectation: Response covers protocol awareness and compliance training
grades.reason: Explicitly mentions 'Law Society Conveyancing Protocol — complete training on all stages' and protocol compliance throughout

grades.expectation: Response mentions supervision requirements for new staff
grades.reason: References 'Assigned supervisor details (Standard 3.3)' in documentation section

grades.expectation: Response references the need to maintain training records as CQS evidence
grades.reason: Multiple references to evidence requirements and dedicated 'Documentation for CQS Audit' section detailing record-keeping

grades.expectation: Response distinguishes CQS firm-level requirements from individual SRA competence
grades.reason: Includes clear 'Important Distinction' section explicitly contrasting CQS firm requirements vs SRA individual requirements
